label: Seattle apartment
description: A cramped, dark second-floor Seattle apartment at 2 AM: sparse mismatched furniture, moving boxes from a recent breakup, cold blue moonlight through a window

label: Seattle ruins
description: The ruins of a Seattle neighbourhood at night after an apocalyptic collapse: buildings flattened to rectangles of churned dirt and rubble, freezing mist, a single glowing blue World Dungeon entrance in the distance

label: Floor 1 tunnels
description: Dim rough-hewn stone dungeon tunnels of Floor 1, flickering torchlight, damp walls, an ominous crawling-dungeon atmosphere, no characters

label: Tutorial Guild Hall
description: The interior of a shabby tutorial guild hall safe room on dungeon Floor 1: a worn wooden front desk and counter, mismatched lamps, cluttered shelves, warm lamplight, cosy but run-down
